title: Building the App Store for Agentic Engineering
summary: Cole Medin is developing a workflow marketplace for Archon, a platform that supports YAML-based agentic workflows running in isolated git worktrees with any model provider. The marketplace allows users to install and share pre-built workflows for AI coding, eliminating duplicate effort across users.
